description: Use this API to tabulate area totals by area, as well as the desired area net interchange (activity AREA). This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = area_2(sid, all, opt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid area subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. area subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All areas or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Load and induction machine reporting option. (input; 2 by default).

all.description: process only areas in area subsystem SID.

opt.description: tabulate loads, induction generators and induction motors connected to area buses.
tabulate loads, induction generators and induction motors assigned to the area.

tabulate three load and induction machine subtotals for each area: -area load and induction machines connected to area buses -area load and induction machines connected to non-area buses -non-area load and induction machines connected to area buses.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
